---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a change to an existing one
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

<!--
What are you trying to do that Sovyx doesn't support today?
Describe the user-visible problem, not the implementation you have in mind.
Concrete examples (conversation transcripts, config snippets, CLI invocations)
help more than abstractions.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
How would you like this to work?
If there is a natural home for it in the existing architecture — a new plugin,
a cognitive-loop phase, a dashboard page, an LLM-router option — point at it.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit. This is where you
can argue against the proposed solution — reviewers appreciate honest trade-offs.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
- Is this blocking something you're trying to build on top of Sovyx?
- Does a similar feature exist in another project you can point at?
- Would you be able to contribute the implementation? (Optional — feature
  requests don't require a PR from the reporter.)
-->
